items.title: Pakistani strikes kill dozens in Afghanistan
items.dek: The Taliban government says civilians were killed, while Pakistan maintains they targeted militants.
items.body: The Taliban government says civilians were killed, while Pakistan maintains they targeted militants.
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: Anger directed at Venezuela's official response to earthquake recovery
items.dek: Residents in quake-affected areas have expressed anger over the state's efforts to locate survivors and help victims, the BBC's Orla Guerin reports.
items.body: Residents in quake-affected areas have expressed anger over the state's efforts to locate survivors and help victims, the BBC's Orla Guerin reports.
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: South Korea football coach quits as president calls for probe into World Cup loss
items.dek: South Korea was eliminated after missing out on a spot among the eight best third-placed teams.
items.body: South Korea was eliminated after missing out on a spot among the eight best third-placed teams.
items.author: IriLine Desk
